attempted_route: importlib.util.spec_from_file_location on rules/*.py; probe loop for entry-points (apply/predict/is_nvc); heuristic pd.read_csv column detection for model CSVs; mode-based MFA from Ragni2016.csv; columns: Model, model_accuracy, accuracy_<rule>, improvement_<rule>
observation: exec exit_code=0, shape (7,4) — only 1 rule loaded (atmosphere); all model_accuracy=0.0 (zero task-key matches); evaluator returned (0,''), func_correctness=False
rationale: Two compounded bugs: (1) rule probe loop found no recognized entry-point in 5 of 6 rule .py files so they were silently skipped, leaving only atmosphere; (2) heuristic column detection chose wrong task/prediction columns in model CSVs, causing zero task-key overlap with Ragni2016.csv and all base accuracies=0.0.
recommended_alternative: First print df.columns and df.head(2) for one model CSV and Ragni2016.csv to identify exact column names and key format before any matching. Then inspect rule .py files directly (print dir(mod)) to find the real callable name. Hard-code exact column names and entry-points instead of probing heuristics.
